task: Pivot Step 4: Path A — Dense reward best-first search

model.architecture: CharCNN dual-encoder with dense reward best-first

per_theorem.name: quadratic_nonneg
per_theorem.ground_truth:
have h : (x - 1)^2 = x^2 - 2*x + 1 := by ring
rw [← h]
exact pow_two_nonneg _

per_theorem.name: cubic_monotonic
per_theorem.ground_truth:
have hsq : x^2 ≤ y^2 := by nlinarith
nlinarith

per_theorem.name: transitive_equality
per_theorem.ground_truth:
calc
  a = b := h1
  _ = c := h2
  _ = d := h3

per_theorem.name: calc_with_rewrite
per_theorem.ground_truth:
calc
  (a + b) - b = a + (b - b) := by ring
  _ = a + 0 := by ring
  _ = a := by ring

per_theorem.name: calc_square_expand
per_theorem.ground_truth:
calc
  (x + 1)^2 = x^2 + 2*x*1 + 1^2 := by ring
  _ = x^2 + 2*x + 1 := by ring

per_theorem.name: calc_inequality_chain
per_theorem.ground_truth:
calc
  a ≤ b := h1
  _ ≤ c := h2

per_theorem.name: hypothetical_syllogism
per_theorem.ground_truth:
intro hP
apply hQR
apply hPQ
exact hP

per_theorem.name: disjunction_elim
per_theorem.ground_truth:
rcases hOr with (hP | hQ)
· exact hPQ hP
· exact hQR hQ

per_theorem.name: contrapositive
per_theorem.ground_truth:
intro hnQ
intro hP
apply hnQ
apply h
exact hP

per_theorem.name: have_intermediate
per_theorem.ground_truth:
have hsum : n + 3 = 5 + 3 := by rw [h]
have hcalc : 5 + 3 = 8 := by norm_num
rw [hsum, hcalc]

per_theorem.name: refine_with_congr
per_theorem.ground_truth: refine congrArg (fun x : ℝ => x + 1) h

per_theorem.name: cases_on_bool
per_theorem.ground_truth:
cases b
· exact Or.inr rfl
· exact Or.inl rfl

per_theorem.name: induction_identity_nat
per_theorem.ground_truth:
induction n with
| zero => rfl
| succ n ih =>
  simp [Nat.succ_add, ih]

per_theorem.name: induction_succ_add
per_theorem.ground_truth:
induction m with
| zero => rfl
| succ m ih =>
  simp [Nat.succ_add, ih]

per_theorem.name: induction_mul_zero
per_theorem.ground_truth:
induction n with
| zero => rfl
| succ n ih =>
  simp [Nat.succ_mul, ih]

per_theorem.name: alg_cross_multiply
per_theorem.ground_truth: have h' := congrArg (fun t => t * (b * d)) h; field_simp [hb, hd] at h'; exact h'

per_theorem.name: ana_triangle_rev
per_theorem.ground_truth: have h := abs_sub_abs_le_abs_sub x y; linarith

per_theorem.name: ana_eps_delta
per_theorem.ground_truth: have h := lt_of_lt_of_le hδ hδε; exact h

per_theorem.name: ana_abs_prod_pos
per_theorem.ground_truth: apply abs_pos.mpr; exact mul_ne_zero hx hy

per_theorem.name: ana_midpoint_bound
per_theorem.ground_truth: have hmid : (a + b)/2 - a = (b - a)/2 := by ring; have hbmid : b - (a + b)/2 = (b - a)/2 := by ring; nlinarith

per_theorem.name: ana_sum_abs_bound
per_theorem.ground_truth:
calc
  |x + y| ≤ |x| + |y| := abs_add _ _
  _ ≤ M + M := add_le_add hx hy
  _ = 2*M := by ring

per_theorem.name: ana_bernstein_bounds
per_theorem.ground_truth: have h_base : 0 ≤ 1 - x := by linarith; have h_ub : 1 - x ≤ 1 := by linarith; constructor; exact pow_nonneg h_base (by exact_mod_cast hn0); exact pow_le_one _ h_base h_ub

per_theorem.name: era_lorentz_bound
per_theorem.ground_truth: have h_sq_pos : c^2 > 0 := pow_pos hc 2; exact (div_lt_one h_sq_pos).mpr (by nlinarith)

per_theorem.name: era_time_dilation
per_theorem.ground_truth:
have h_sqrt : 0 < Real.sqrt (1 - v^2/c^2) ∧ Real.sqrt (1 - v^2/c^2) ≤ 1 := by
  have h_nonneg : 0 ≤ 1 - v^2/c^2 := by
    have h_sq : v^2/c^2 < 1 := by
      have h_sq_pos : c^2 > 0 := pow_pos hc 2
      exact (div_lt_one h_sq_pos).mpr (by nlinarith)
    nlinarith
  have h_sqrt_pos : 0 < Real.sqrt (1 - v^2/c^2) := Real.sqrt_pos.mpr (by nlinarith)
  have h_sqrt_le : Real.sqrt (1 - v^2/c^2) ≤ 1 := Real.sqrt_le_one h_nonneg
  exact ⟨h_sqrt_pos, h_sqrt_le⟩
apply (one_le_div ?_ h).mpr h_sqrt.2; exact ⟨h_sqrt.1, h⟩

per_theorem.name: era_heisenberg_bound
per_theorem.ground_truth:
constructor
· by_contra hx; push_neg at hx; have h1 : Δx * Δp ≤ 0 := mul_nonpos_of_nonpos_of_nonneg hx (by nlinarith); linarith
· by_contra hp; push_neg at hp; have h2 : Δx * Δp ≤ 0 := mul_nonpos_of_nonneg_of_nonpos (by nlinarith) hp; linarith

per_theorem.name: logic_contrapositive
per_theorem.ground_truth: intro hnR hP; apply hnR; apply hQR; apply hPQ; exact hP

per_theorem.name: logic_cases_or
per_theorem.ground_truth: rcases h_or with (hP | hQ); exact hPQ hP; exact hQR hQ

per_theorem.name: logic_demorgan
per_theorem.ground_truth:
constructor
· intro h; by_cases hP : P; right; intro hQ; apply h; exact ⟨hP, hQ⟩; left; exact hP
· intro h hPQ; rcases hPQ with ⟨hP, hQ⟩; rcases h with (hNP | hNQ); exact hNP hP; exact hNQ hQ

per_theorem.name: logic_iff_trans
per_theorem.ground_truth: constructor; intro hP; exact hQR.mp (hPQ.mp hP); intro hR; exact hPQ.mpr (hQR.mpr hR)

per_theorem.name: logic_modus_tollens
per_theorem.ground_truth: intro hP; apply hnR; apply hQR; apply hPQ; exact hP

per_theorem.name: nt_sum_first_n
per_theorem.ground_truth:
induction' n with k ih
· simp
· rw [Finset.sum_range_succ, mul_add, add_comm, ← add_assoc, ih]; ring

per_theorem.name: hard_quadratic_formula
per_theorem.ground_truth: have h_discr : 4*a*(a*x^2 + b*x + c) = 0 := by rw [h]; ring; nlinarith

per_theorem.name: hard_mvt_inequality
per_theorem.ground_truth: have h_diff : x^3 - y^3 = (x - y)*(x^2 + x*y + y^2) := by ring; rw [h_diff]; have h_nonpos : x - y ≤ 0 := by linarith; nlinarith [sq_nonneg x, sq_nonneg y]

per_theorem.name: hard_telescoping
per_theorem.ground_truth:
induction' n with m ih
· simp
· rw [Finset.sum_range_succ, ih]; push_cast; ring

per_theorem.name: hard_amgm_sqrt
per_theorem.ground_truth: have h_nonneg : (Real.sqrt x - Real.sqrt y)^2 ≥ 0 := pow_two_nonneg _; nlinarith [Real.sq_sqrt hx, Real.sq_sqrt hy]

per_theorem.name: hard_poly_interp_two
per_theorem.ground_truth:
refine ⟨Polynomial.C ((y0*x1 - y1*x0)/(x1 - x0)) + Polynomial.C ((y1 - y0)/(x1 - x0)) * Polynomial.X, ?_, ?_⟩
· field_simp [hx]; ring
· field_simp [hx]; ring

per_theorem.name: hard_system_substitution
per_theorem.ground_truth: rw [h3] at h1; have hy : y = a/3 := by linarith; rw [hy] at h2; linarith

per_theorem.name: hard_abs_ineq_mul
per_theorem.ground_truth: rw [abs_mul]; have h_nonneg_a : 0 ≤ |a| := abs_nonneg _; have h_nonneg_b : 0 ≤ |b| := abs_nonneg _; nlinarith

per_theorem.name: alg_linear_system_v2
per_theorem.ground_truth: have hx : x = (a + b)/2 := by linarith; have hy : y = (a - b)/2 := by linarith; exact And.intro hx hy

per_theorem.name: alg_ratio_bound_v2
per_theorem.ground_truth: have h1 : a / b ≤ 1 := (div_le_one hb).mpr h; have h2 : 1 ≤ b / a := by rw [← one_le_div ha]; exact h; exact And.intro h1 h2

per_theorem.name: alg_sqrt_v2
per_theorem.ground_truth: have h := Real.sqrt_mul hp q; constructor; exact h; exact Real.sqrt_nonneg _

per_theorem.name: poly_degree_v2
per_theorem.ground_truth: constructor; rw [Polynomial.degree_add_le]; exact le_rfl; rw [Polynomial.natDegree_add_le]; exact le_rfl

per_theorem.name: poly_deg_mul_v2
per_theorem.ground_truth: constructor; rw [Polynomial.natDegree_mul hp hq]; rw [Polynomial.degree_mul]; exact rfl

per_theorem.name: poly_monic_v2
per_theorem.ground_truth: have h := Polynomial.Monic.mul hp hq; constructor; exact h; simp [hp.leadingCoeff, hq.leadingCoeff]

per_theorem.name: era_newton_gravity_v2
per_theorem.ground_truth: constructor; apply div_pos; apply mul_pos; apply mul_pos; nlinarith [hr]; nlinarith [hr]; nlinarith [hr]; apply div_pos; apply mul_pos; apply mul_pos; nlinarith [hr]; nlinarith [hr]; nlinarith [hr]

per_theorem.name: era_einstein_v2
per_theorem.ground_truth: have hR := by linarith; constructor; exact hR; positivity

per_theorem.name: nt_dvd_trans_v2
per_theorem.ground_truth: have h_ac : a ∣ c := Nat.dvd_trans hab hbc; have h_sum : a ∣ b + c := by apply Nat.dvd_add hab h_ac; constructor; exact h_ac; exact h_sum

per_theorem.name: nt_euclid_v2
per_theorem.ground_truth: have h_or := hp.dvd_mul.mp h; rcases h_or with (hpa | hpb); left; exact hpa; right; exact hpb

comparison.note: Path A adds step-level dense rewards on top of Path C (contrastive+best-first). Rewards: (a) +0.1 per valid tactic, (b) goal proximity via embedding distance, (c) +1.0 completion bonus. Gate2 = training/calibration, Gate3 = held-out evaluation.
